Short title and Commencement:- (1) These rules may be called the Companies (Filing of Documents and Forms in Extensible Business Reporting Language) Amendment Rules, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Companies (Filing of Documents and Forms in Extensible Business Reporting Language) Rules, 2015, in rule 3, for the proviso, the following proviso shall be substituted, namely:- “Provided that the companies in banking, insurance, power sector, non-banking financial companies and housing finance companies need not file financial statements under this rule.”. [F. No. 1/19/2013-CL-V] AMARDEEP SINGH BHATIA, Jt. Secy. Note.- The principal rules were notified vide notification number GSR 692(E) dated 09.09.2015.
